original_image_tags: A blank, light gray file folder divider sheet. The top left tab has the numbers "5-2500" printed on it. A second tab slightly to the right has the numbers "9-544" printed on it. The word "SECRET" is stamped in black ink near the top center and near the bottom center, with both instances crossed out by a horizontal line. In the top right corner, a blue and white "DECLASSIFIED" sticker is affixed, bearing the text "Authority: NND 857013".

elements.description: A scanned image of the back or cover of a file folder. Visible elements include handwritten numbers '5-2500' and '9-544' at the top, two stamped instances of 'SECRET' with black redaction bars over a preceding word, and a blue 'DECLASSIFIED' stamp with authority 'NND 857013' in the top right corner.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same visual elements: two tab numbers ('5-2500' and '9-544'), two 'SECRET' stamps with crossing-out, and a blue 'DECLASSIFIED' sticker with authority 'NND 857013'.
